chapter_title.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ تَكُونُ لِوَلَدِهِ الْجَارِيَةُ يُرِيدُ أَنْ يَطَأَهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 112 – The man whose son happens to have a slave girl, so he intends to sleep with her

text: الرَّجُلِ تَكُونُ لِبَعْضِ وُلْدِهِ جَارِيَةٌ وَ وُلْدُهُ صِغَارٌ هَلْ يَصْلُحُ لَهُ أَنْ يَطَأَهَا فَقَالَ يُقَوِّمُهَا قِيمَةَ عَدْلٍ ثُمَّ يَأْخُذُهَا وَ يَكُونُ لِوَلَدِهِ عَلَيْهِ ثَمَنُهَا.

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Numan, from Abu Al Sabbah,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> regarding the man, there happens to be a slave girl for one of his young sons. Is it correct for him that he sleeps with her?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘He would evaluate her with a just price, and then take her, and there would happen to be upon him, for his son, her price’.
